nameMeanings.name: Hillary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Caitlin, Ciaran.
English (of Norman origin):

from the Middle English and Old French male or female personal name Hilari(e), Ilari(e), and Elari(e), from Latin Hilarius and Hilaria ‘joyful’ (from Greek hilaros). The Latin name was chosen by many early Christians to express their joy and hope of salvation, and was borne by several saints, including a 4th-century bishop of Poitiers (died 368) noted for his vigorous resistance to the Arian heresy, and a 5th-century bishop of Arles. Largely due to veneration of Saint Hilarius of Poitiers, the name became popular in France in the forms Hilari and Hilaire, and was brought to England by the Norman conquerors. Although quite popular in France, it was only occasionally used in England, where it was confused with the name in 2 below.

variants.name: Ellery
meanings: variant of   Hillary  .
habitational name from Elleray in Windermere (Westmorland), probably from Old Norse elri ‘alder’ + vrá ‘nook’.
English:

variants.name: Gloor
meanings: Swiss German: from a vernacular form of the Latin personal name Hilarius (see Hillary ).

variants.name: Hillier
meanings: English (Wiltshire and Surrey): occupational name for a roofer from Middle English hil(l)ier, hul(li)er, hel(li)er ‘roofer, slater, tiler’, agent nouns from the Middle English verb hil(i)en, hel(i)an, hul(i)en ‘to put a roof on; cover with a roof’.
French: from the personal name Hillier, a vernacular form of Hilaire (see Hillary ).

variants.name: Alario
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Orazio, Carlo, Rocco, Salvatore, Vita, Vitina.
Italian: from a vernacular form of the personal name Ilario, from Latin Hilarius (see Hillary ).
Italian (Sicily): probably a status name from dialect alariu ‘herald’.

variants.name: Glor
meanings: German: from a vernacular form of the Latin personal name Hilarius (see Hillary ).

variants.name: Hillery
meanings: English: variant of   Hillary  . This name has long been established in Ireland (Clare).

variants.name: Hilaire
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jacques, Pierre, Antoine, Chantal, Edeline, Georges, Luc, Maryse, Mimose, Serge, Yolaine.
French and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from the personal name Hilaire, French form of Hillary 1. This surname is most common in Haiti. Compare Helaire .

variants.name: Hilleary
meanings: English (Essex): variant of   Hillary  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Allaire
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Andre, Lucien, Alphonse, Antoine, Armand, Emile, Michel, Pierre, Raoul, Raymonde, Rolande.
French: from the Old French personal name Allaire, a variant of Hilaire (see Hillary ). Compare Dallaire .

History: Jean and Charles Allaire, two brothers from the Poitou region of France, are recorded in Quebec City, QC, in 1662 and 1663, respectively, the years of their marriage. The descendants of one or another brother also bear altered forms of the surname, such as Dallaire, Delair, and Delaire. — Alexandre Allaire, a Huguenot refugee, brought the name from La Rochelle in France to New Rochelle, NY, in 1686, via the West Indies. He is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Hilario
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Julio, Alfredo, Luis, Abelardo, Arturo, Eduardo, Francisco, Juan, Mario, Pedro, Carlos, Cesar.  Portuguese Afonso, Joao.
Portuguese (Hilário) and Spanish: from a personal name ofthe same origin as Hillary 1.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Hillary I was born in 1375, in England, his father, Roger Hillary, was 44 and his mother, Margaret Audley, was 36. He had at least 1 son with F De Hillary. He died in 1419, in his hometown, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Hillary I est né en 1375, à Angleterre, son père, Roger Hillary, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Margaret Audley, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec F De Hillary. Il est décédé en 1419, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Hillary I 1375 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Hillary 44 und seine Mutter Margaret Audley 36. Er hatte mit F De Hillary mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1419 im Alter von 44 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Hillary I è nato il nel 1375 nel England, il suo padre, Roger Hillary, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Audley, aveva 36 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con F De Hillary. Morì nel 1419, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Hillary I(이)가 1375년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Hillary(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Audley(은)는 36세였다. 그는 F De Hillary(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1419년 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Hillary I nasceu em 1375, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Hillary, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Audley, tinha 36 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com F De Hillary. Ele faleceu em 1419, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Hillary I родился в 1375 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Hillary было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Audley, 36. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от F De Hillary. Он умер в 1419 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Hillary I nació en 1375, en Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Hillary, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Margaret Audley, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con F De Hillary. Murió en 1419, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años.
